title: Graham Mackay
description: Australia & Scotland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Graham Mackay (born 12 October 1968) is a former international and state representative rugby league footballer whose club career spanned ten Australian and English clubs, including Western Suburbs, Penrith Panthers, South Queensland Crushers, Gold Coast Chargers, Hull FC, Leeds Rhinos and the Ipswich Jets in a sixteen-year top grade career. His position of choice was on the wing, though he played centre later in his career.
Mackay competed in and won the Gladiator Individual Sports Athletes Challenge in 1995.
